description: The Fazzari are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta originating from Taurianova, Calabria, with operations in Lombardy, Piedmont, Lazio, Liguria, Australia, and France. They are involved in drug trafficking, illegal waste disposal, vote-buying, and kidnappings. The group is closely allied with the Gullace family and in conflict with the Facchineri family. They have been targeted by anti-mafia operations including 'Saggezza'.

country_links.evidence_quote: con ulteriori ramificazioni che si registrano anche all'estero, in particolare in Australia ed in Francia in Costa Azzurra
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Fazzari has branches in Australia.

country_links.evidence_quote: con ulteriori ramificazioni che si registrano anche all'estero, in particolare in Australia ed in Francia in Costa Azzurra
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Fazzari has branches in France, specifically on the French Riviera.

country_links.evidence_quote: la cui conclusione è stata attesa da Filippo Fazzari in Spagna
country_links.context: A member of the Fazzari family awaited the conclusion of a criminal proceeding in Spain.
